title: centrosema cuspidatum
intro: Centrosema cuspidatum, also known as sensitive plant, is a leguminous vine native to South America and widely distributed in tropical and subtropical regions. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The health benefits of Centrosema cuspidatum include its use in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Centrosema cuspidatum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used topically to apply the plant's medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
